overview: A full-stack trilingual catering website for RFF Catering Service with an Islamic-themed design. Customers can browse the menu, place orders, view invoices, pay via QR code or Cash on Delivery, and track their order status. The owner has a password-protected admin dashboard for complete menu management and real-time order updates.
features: Bismillah banner in Arabic and English with meaning
Trilingual support: Arabic (RTL), English, and Tamil
Menu with food images, prices, and order buttons
Guest order placement with name and contact number
Itemised invoice with QR code payment or Cash on Delivery
Real-time order status tracking by order ID
Full menu CRUD: add, edit, remove items and prices
Islamic-themed design with green, gold, and white colours
